overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a rain-soaked highway shoulder during a heavy downpour. The camera moves steadily forward past street lights and guardrails, approaching and passing under an overhead sign gantry. The footage appears to be from a high-fidelity game engine, featuring realistic wet surface reflections, atmospheric fog, and detailed rain effects.

events.description: dark colored sedan drives past on the right side of the highway
camera passes the first illuminated street light pole on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet highway shoulder next to the metal guardrail

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past on the main highway lane with headlights on

entered.detail: continuous green metal barrier running along the left edge of the walkway
tall dual-lamp street light pole with illuminated fixtures
multiple electrical transmission lines running parallel to the highway
elevated concrete highway bridge visible through the rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked highway shoulder with a metal guardrail running along the left. The camera walks steadily forward through heavy rain, passing a tall street light pole while a sedan drives by on the right. In the distance, an elevated highway overpass is visible through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to overhead sign gantry

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the shoulder, approaching the overhead sign structure

entered.detail: large overhead highway sign structure with multiple directional signs spanning the road
concrete drums or barriers positioned near the base of the gantry

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the wet highway shoulder, having passed the first street light. An overhead sign gantry becomes visible ahead, gradually growing larger as the camera approaches. Concrete barriers appear near the gantry base while the distant overpass remains visible through the rain.

events.description: camera passes directly underneath the overhead highway sign gantry

agents.ego_description: walking under the overhead gantry and continuing toward the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the large overhead sign gantry, briefly entering a semi-covered space. After emerging, the highway overpass appears closer ahead while the concrete barriers and gantry structure fall behind. The metal guardrail continues along the left as the journey progresses through the persistent rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-slicked highway shoulder that leads from an open stretch of road toward a looming overhead structure. It begins by passing a tall street light and a moving sedan, with a metal guardrail lining the left side and a distant overpass visible through the hazy downpour. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts toward a large overhead sign gantry that gradually grows in scale, flanked by concrete barriers at its base. The scene then transitions as the camera passes directly underneath the gantry, briefly entering a semi-covered space before emerging back into the open rain. Finally, the gantry falls behind as the camera continues its steady progress, bringing the distant highway overpass into closer view.
